caption:
Google turned off call-only ads.

If you're a contractor, HVAC company, or roofer running Google Ads to make the phone ring, this affects your account directly.

As of February 2026, you can no longer create a new call-only ad. Every existing one stops running by February 2027.

The replacement (responsive search ads with call assets) requires something call-only ads never did: a real landing page behind the click. Weak page, fewer calls shown.

It also means your leads start splitting between phone calls and web clicks instead of just calls. That's more places for a lead to land unanswered.

Check your account this week. If call-only campaigns are still live, migrate now instead of waiting for Google to shut them off for you.

DM "CALLS" and Black Arrow will look at what's running and what needs to move.

#GoogleAds #HomeServices #ContractorMarketing #LeadGeneration #HVACMarketing
rationale: Carousels are currently outperforming Reels on saves and engagement per multiple 2026 benchmarks, and this delivers fresh, high-relevance Google Ads news (the call-only ad phase-out) that most owners haven't tracked, with a clear migration checklist tied back to the speed-to-lead problem Black Arrow solves.
